trace_data.task: Automate address autocomplete feature using Google Maps API

attributes.error: TimeoutError: Autocomplete dropdown did not appear. CORS error detected in console: 'Access to XMLHttpRequest from origin blocked by CORS policy'
console_errors: Access to XMLHttpRequest at 'https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/place/autocomplete' from origin 'https://demo.teststore.com' has been blocked by CORS policy

result.error: CORS error blocked Google Maps autocomplete API call. The test environment doesn't have a valid Maps API key configured, causing the autocomplete dropdown to never appear.
